---
title: Discovery of metabolites prevails amid in-source fragmentation
type: correspondence
venue: Nature Metabolism
date: 2025-02-28
doi: 10.1038/s42255-025-01239-4
qid: Q139488578
image: https://media.springernature.com/full/springer-static/image/art%3A10.1038%2Fs42255-025-01239-4/MediaObjects/42255_2025_1239_Fig1_HTML.png
image-alt: Article's Graphical Abstract
categories:
  - In Source Fragmentation
  - Metabolomics
  - Liquid Chromatography-Tandem Mass Spectrometry
# metadata-files:
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/YasinElAbiead_TODO_eq.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/AdrianoRutz_IMSB_eq.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/SimoneZuffa_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/BasharAmer_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/ShipeiXing_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/CorinnaBrungs_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/RobinSchmid_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/MarioCorreia_IMSB.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/AndresCarballo_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/AmirZarrinpar_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/HelenaManocchio_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/MichaelWitting_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/IpsitaMohanty_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/TomasPluskal_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/WoutBittremieux_ANTWERP.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/RobKnight_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/AndrewPatterson_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/JustinVanDerHooft_MULTI.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/SebastianBoecker_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/WarwickDunn_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/RogerLinington_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/DavidWishart_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/JeanLucWolfender_UNIGE.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/OliverFiehn_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/NicolaZamboni_IMSB.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/authors/PieterDorrestein_TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/affiliations/TODO.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/affiliations/IMSB_Zamboni.yml
#   - ../../_includes/entities/affiliations/TODO.yml
nocite: |
  @ElAbiead2025a
---

```{=html}
<iframe width="100%"
        height="100%"
        src="https://scholia.toolforge.org/work/{{< meta qid >}}"
        title="Scholia entry">
</iframe>
```
